content:
🌟 Load-Monitor | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automated resource management and throttling of runaway processes on Linux systems with cgroups v2 enabled.
✨ Key Features: • Real-time system metrics collection (CPU, memory, load average) • Per-process monitoring • Rule-based resource limiting • CPU and memory restriction via cgroups v2 • Configurable duration thresholds
📖 Summary: Load-Monitor is a Rust-based daemon for Linux that automatically throttles resource-intensive processes using cgroups v2. It monitors CPU and RAM usage, applying configurable rules to limit or terminate processes that exceed defined thresholds.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
